title_en: BVO: The 65-Year Delay in Food Safety
title_es: BVO: El retraso de 65 años en la seguridad alimentaria
hook_en: She holds up a soda bottle: 'This ingredient is banned in Europe!'
hook_es: Ella sostiene una botella de refresco: '¡Este ingrediente está prohibido en Europa!'
key_message: The FDA is finally banning BVO in 2023, decades after it was banned in the EU and Japan, highlighting significant delays in US food safety regulations.
_source_regulation_context:
KEY REGULATORY EVENTS:
  • 2023: FDA proposes ban on brominated vegetable oil (BVO) — Impact: Was GRAS since 1958 — took 65 years to act; banned in EU/Japan for decades

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_es: Obesidad en EE. UU.: El impacto oculto de la desregulación
hook_en: She eats a donut: 'What's really fueling this obesity epidemic?'
hook_es: Ella come una dona: '¿Qué está alimentando realmente esta epidemia de obesidad?'
key_message: US deregulation has allowed harmful additives to persist in foods, paralleling the alarming rise in obesity rates over decades.
